text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
305 
RELATIONSHIP_DESC 
LABEL: 
Relationship Description 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the description of the relationship between the contract and plan ID that was active in 
in the reference year — and any associated contract and plan ID(s) in the previous year. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
15 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
New 

= no link to a plan in the prior year
